entries.title: Do Not Treat NJO as Sith War

context.label: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.
continuity.notes: Development deck. Keep separate from Disney canon and later post-NJO Legends unless a later deck is active.

content.fact: The New Jedi Order era is not primarily a Sith resurgence plot; its central conflict is the Yuuzhan Vong invasion.
content.injection: Do not default NJO scenes to Sith/Empire structure unless a specific loaded deck or premise introduces it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.
content.notes: Generated development Lorecard pending human review.

entries.title: Do Not Use Disney Sequel Defaults

context.label: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.

content.fact: Disney sequel-era events and institutions do not apply to this Legends NJO deck.
content.injection: Avoid First Order, Rey, Snoke, Kylo Ren, Ben Solo, and Disney Luke exile unless the user explicitly stacks Disney canon. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.

content.fact: Yuuzhan Vong scenes should feel materially different because tools, ships, pain, religion, and status are biological.
content.injection: Use living equipment, pain rituals, caste language, and anti-machine values to distinguish Vong spaces. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.
antiLore: Do not solve the scene by ignoring this rule unless user-authored continuity overrides it.

content.fact: Refugee displacement is persistent throughout the war and should affect politics, logistics, and character priorities.
content.injection: When civilian stakes matter, include displaced populations and relief constraints rather than only front-line battles. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War.

entries.title: No Anakin Solo Alive After Myrkr

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.
continuity.notes: Development deck. Keep separate from Disney canon and later post-NJO Legends unless a later deck is active.

content.fact: Anakin Solo is dead after the Myrkr mission in standard Legends continuity.
content.injection: After the Myrkr mission, block casual Anakin Solo appearances in standard Legends continuity; use memory, grief, Force-vision, or declared AU if he appears afterward.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Myrkr Voxyn Mission.
Respect story-position bounds from Myrkr Voxyn Mission to Myrkr Voxyn Mission.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.

context.label: After Coruscant falls, before Galactic Alliance consolidation
context.phase: Myrkr and Coruscant Fall to Galactic Alliance Transition

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.

content.fact: Coruscant is not a stable Galactic Alliance capital after it falls to the Yuuzhan Vong.
content.injection: When active in After Coruscant falls, before Galactic Alliance consolidation, between Coruscant’s fall and liberation, block normal Senate/capital assumptions on Coruscant. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Coruscant falls, before Galactic Alliance consolidation.

entries.title: Do Not Backport Later Legends Tragedies

context.label: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.
continuity.notes: Development deck. Keep separate from Disney canon and later post-NJO Legends unless a later deck is active.

content.fact: Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and later family tragedies belong after this deck boundary.
content.injection: During NJO, do not inject Darth Caedus, Mara’s later death, Abeloth, or Fate-era Ben unless a later deck is active. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War.
